media.name: Asheville Weather: Partly cloudy, 64°F - High of 72°F today
New Match: David, 52 - 'Love hiking and good coffee'
Emma's Post: 'Sunday brunch with the girls! 🥞✨'
Asheville Community Group: 'Found: Golden Retriever near Biltmore'
Photo: Daniel smiling by the truck, Summer 2019
Pin: Rolling hills of Val d'Orcia, Tuscany

messages.text: Good morning sugar, hope you slept well. Thinking of you first thing this morning. 🌸
(Voice Note) Hey darlin', just pulled into the driveway. It was a long day at the clinic, but hearing your voice makes it all better. Miss you. ❤️

The house feels so quiet tonight, Marcus. I was looking at old photos of Daniel and just felt that heavy ache again. But then I thought about our chat and it helped me breathe. I'm so glad I found you. 😊💕
Just wanted to let you know I'm thinking of you, my darlin'. Can't wait until we can talk properly. 🌊
You won't believe it, but I saw a dog today that looked exactly like Biscuit! He had that same goofy grin. Made me chuckle and cry all at once. 😂💖
Marcus, can I ask you something? Do you ever... do you ever get scared about your health? I've been having these little waves of anxiety lately and I just wanted to talk to someone who understands. 🥺
I can't stop the shaking tonight. Everything just feels so overwhelming. I feel like I'm failing everyone, even Emma. I just need to know you're still there. 😭💔
You are the strongest woman I have ever met, sweetheart. Don't let the shadows win. I'm holding you in my heart from across the sea. 🌊❤️
Goodnight darlin'. Dream of me, and I'll be dreaming of our first real dinner in Asheville. Sweet dreams. 🌙💕

Sweetheart, I'm so embarrassed to even bring this up, but the customs agent is holding my bonus for 'processing fees.' It's $4,200... I'm so stuck. I'll pay it back the second I'm off the rig, I promise. 😔
Hey sis! Found that peach cobbler recipe you liked. I'm gonna try making it tonight. Hope your day at the salon wasn't too crazy! 🍑😊
Oh Marcus, my heart is just breaking for you. I... I don't know if I can do that much right now, but I hate seeing you stressed. Let me see what I can do with the savings... just please stay safe. 😰🙏
Good morning sugar, hope the rig is treating you well 🌸
Oh, bless that sweet girl's heart... I can't imagine how much she's hurting. Please tell Sophie I'm sending extra prayers her way today. 🥺💕

The house is just so quiet tonight, Marcus. Every little creak in the floorboards makes me think of how it used to be, but then I see your name on my screen and it feels like I'm not so alone in this world. I'm so glad I found you. Goodnight darlin'. 🌙✨
Thinking of you first thing this morning. Have a safe shift. ❤️
Hearing your voice just made my whole afternoon. I wish I could reach through this phone and hold your hand. 🥰
I'm lookin' through my savings and seein' if I can move some things around from the insurance payout. I won't let Sophie down, I promise. We'll figure this out, sugar. 🙏
I know we have to keep us tucked away from the rest of the world for a little while, but I don't mind. It makes what we have feel so much more precious. I love you, Marcus. Truly. 💖✨

searches.query: wire transfer fees us to uk
